subcodes.first_line: Grieve not over any matter, after that which thou hast borne of tribulations in My love and calamities in My path. By My life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ا تحزن من شیء بعد الذی ادرکت البلایاء فی حبی و الرزایاء فی سبیلی فو عمری
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @nearness and remoteness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
